message:
refactor(imessage): configurable timeout, generic response handling, error improvements

Refactored BlueBubbles client with:
- New from_config() constructor that builds directly from typed config
- Configurable request_timeout (no longer hardcoded to 30s)
- Generic JSON response parsing with DeserializeOwned trait bound
- Input trimming for server_url and password to prevent whitespace bugs
- Extracted common HTTP response handling into shared methods

Connector updated to use the new from_config() path. Error module
refined with improved variant coverage. Types expanded with new
BlueBubblesConfig struct and additional message/chat type definitions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
